title: ForgeCadNeo
description: AI-powered CAD reconstruction platform that converts 2D engineering drawings into manufacturing-grade 3D STEP files. Uses OpenCASCADE B-Rep kernel with GPT-4o vision to extract dimensions, tolerances, and features — reducing 2-8 hours of manual CAD work to approximately 15 minutes. Features multi-tenant architecture, Stripe credit system, and interactive Three.js 3D preview.

title: NCHRecruitPro
description: Enterprise AI-powered Applicant Tracking System and HRM platform with 40+ LangChain agents for resume matching, culture-fit scoring, predictive retention, and skill gap analysis. Features multi-tenant architecture, lead discovery crawlers, payroll management, and real-time analytics dashboards.

title: Errandoo
description: Hyperlocal on-demand delivery and errand platform with real-time GPS tracking, in-task chat, OTP-verified handoffs, and Cashfree payments. Full-stack monorepo with Next.js web app, NestJS API, Flutter mobile app, and comprehensive production monitoring stack including Grafana, Loki, and Sentry.

title: Prevadu Health
description: Comprehensive radiology and healthcare appointment management platform with patient portal, radiologist dashboard, and admin suite. Supports 27 master data modules, SuperPay payment gateway, Firebase push notifications, Microsoft 365 OAuth email, and SMS-based OTP authentication for the Egyptian healthcare market.

title: Appnly
description: Professional service platform for Google Workspace migration and automation. Offers zero-downtime email migrations from legacy systems (Outlook, Exchange, Gmail, cPanel), Google Sheets and AppSheet automation, and DNS/email authentication setup. Trusted by 300+ clients and 20,000+ users globally.

title: Cygnet Design
description: Product design and engineering services platform for a Pune-based firm with 27+ years of experience. Features interactive 3D model viewer using Three.js, project portfolio with video demonstrations, blog system with CMS, and admin dashboard with analytics — serving automotive, construction, agriculture, and EV design industries.

title: Tooffi
description: Personalized cakes and gifts marketplace connecting customers with passionate bakers and artisans. Features advanced filtering by flavor, occasion, and dietary preferences (vegan, gluten-free, sugar-free), baker profiles with ratings, location-based delivery with Leaflet maps, and OTP-based phone authentication.

title: LeadsNeoForge
description: AI-powered lead generation and marketing automation platform with autonomous Python agents for Reddit, LinkedIn, and Twitter outreach. Features n8n-backed workflow automation, Groq LLM content generation, multi-platform campaign scheduling, and real-time metrics tracking dashboard.
